title: Opening for Software Engineer at Indifi Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Indifi Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Indifi Technologies family as a Software Engineer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Indifi Technologies:
Indifi Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies!
